recommendations.title: 12 installed skills are missing from your dashboard
recommendations.detail: docx, pdf, pptx, xlsx, invoice-generator, contract-reviewer, receipt-scanner, video-clip-extractor, video-repurposer, slack-gif-creator, web-artifacts-builder, brand-guidelines
recommendations.action: Tell Claude to add these to your skills.json so they show up here

recommendations.title: visual-page-builder and visual-explainer-test are nearly identical
recommendations.detail: Both create self-contained HTML pages that visually explain concepts. Their descriptions are almost word-for-word the same.
recommendations.action: Try both once, then uninstall whichever feels redundant

recommendations.title: slide-deck-builder and pptx both make presentations
recommendations.detail: slide-deck-builder makes rich HTML slide decks in your browser; pptx creates actual .pptx files you can open in Keynote or PowerPoint.
recommendations.action: Keep both if you use both formats — otherwise uninstall the one you never touch

recommendations.title: Customize is a setup-only skill you may not need
recommendations.detail: The /customize skill mainly helps when first configuring your Cowork setup. Once you know the system, it rarely comes up.
recommendations.action: Safe to uninstall if you feel set up — reinstall anytime from the skill store
